seo.title: Documents | User Guides & Technical Documentation | Able Care
seo.description: Quick start, the Able Assess user guide, integration documents, webhook specifications and the GripAble SDK reference. Download the PDFs or get in touch for anything else.

blocks.headline: Documents
blocks.subtitle: Everything you need to run Able Assess and integrate the Able Platform. User guides for clinical teams, technical references for engineering teams.

blocks.heading: User Guides
blocks.subtitle: Get up and running with Able Assess. The Quick Start gets a new user from unboxing to first screening in minutes; the full User Guide is the complete operator manual for day-to-day use.

items.title: Able Assess Quick Start Guide
items.description: A short visual walkthrough for first-time users. Unbox the sensor, install the app, run your first five-minute screening and review results.

items.title: Able Assess User Guide
items.description: The complete operator manual for Able Assess. Covers sensor setup, the five-minute screening workflow, interpreting results and sharing data with care teams. Written for any member of staff running assessments at the bedside, in the clinic or in a resident's living room.

blocks.heading: Technical Documentation
blocks.subtitle: Integration references for connecting partner systems to the Able Platform and embedding the GripAble sensor in your own applications. OpenAPI specs available on request.

items.title: Able Connect: Partner Integration
items.description: Reference guide for technical teams connecting a partner system to the Able Platform. Covers domain data, access control, API token authentication, operation modes, integration architecture and user management.

items.title: Able Connect: Webhook Integration
items.description: Webhook specification: registration process, event types and payload schemas, delivery requirements, backfill for historical data and the developer testing flow.

items.title: GripAble SDK Reference
items.description: Native plugins for integrating the GripAble BLE sensor into Android and iOS apps. Covers GripableSDK, GripableDevice, GripCalibrationManager, FirmwareUpdateManager and our clinically validated app flow designs.

blocks.heading: Need something else? We are happy to help.
blocks.bodyText: Compliance information lives on the compliance page. For OpenAPI specs, custom integration requirements or anything else, the team is one short message away.
